parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "🌐 *TechExon Website Development*

Great choice — we build modern business websites, landing pages, booking sites, and custom web systems.

Please send your details in this format:

🏢 Business Name:
🖥️ Website Type:
🌍 Do you have a domain:
📄 Pages needed:
🎯 Reference Website:

Example:
🏢 Business Name: XYZ Company
🖥️ Website Type: Business website
🌍 Do you have a domain: Yes
📄 Pages needed: Home, Services, About, Contact
🎯 Reference Website: example.com

Type *menu* anytime to go back.
Or type *human* if you want to explain directly to our team."
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "🤖 *TechExon AI Automation*

Great choice — we can help you automate repetitive business tasks and save time.

Please send your details in this format:

🏢 Business Name:
⚙️ What process do you want to automate:
🧰 Current tool/system you use:
📍 Where should data be saved:
🔗 Need WhatsApp/Email/CRM integration:

Example:
🏢 Business Name: XYZ Company
⚙️ What process do you want to automate: lead replies and follow-ups
🧰 Current tool/system you use: WhatsApp and Google Sheets
📍 Where should data be saved: CRM / Google Sheets
🔗 Need WhatsApp/Email/CRM integration: Yes

Type *menu* anytime to go back.
Or type *human* if you want to explain directly to our team."
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "📊 *TechExon CRM / Dashboard Systems*

Great choice — we can build dashboards to manage your leads, clients, payments, bookings, tasks, and reports in one place.

Please send your details in this format:

🏢 Business Name:
📌 Dashboard Type:
📈 What should it track:
👥 Who will use it:
🔔 Need WhatsApp/Email automation:

Example:
🏢 Business Name: XYZ Company
📌 Dashboard Type: Sales & Lead Management Dashboard
📈 What should it track: leads, clients, payments, follow-ups, team tasks
👥 Who will use it: admin and sales team
🔔 Need WhatsApp/Email automation: Yes

Type *menu* anytime to go back.
Or type *human* if you want to explain directly to our team."
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "💬 *TechExon WhatsApp Bot Automation*

Great choice — we can build WhatsApp bots for lead collection, appointments, support, menus, and CRM automation.

Please send your details in this format:

🏢 Business Name:
🎯 Bot Purpose:
📝 What should the bot collect:
📍 Where should leads be saved:
👤 Need human handoff:

Example:
🏢 Business Name: XYZ Company
🎯 Bot Purpose: collect customer inquiries
📝 What should the bot collect: name, phone, service needed, message
📍 Where should leads be saved: Google Sheets / CRM
👤 Need human handoff: Yes

Type *menu* anytime to go back.
Or type *human* if you want to explain directly to our team."
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "🛡️ *TechExon Cybersecurity & Audit Reports*

Great choice — we can help check your website/domain for security risks and provide a clean audit report.

Please send your details in this format:

🏢 Business Name:
🌍 Website/Domain:
🔍 What do you want checked:
✅ Is this your own business:
⚠️ Any specific concern:

Example:
🏢 Business Name: XYZ Company
🌍 Website/Domain: example.com
🔍 What do you want checked: website security, email security, exposed files, vulnerabilities
✅ Is this your own business: Yes
⚠️ Any specific concern: I want to know if my website or company systems are exposed

Type *menu* anytime to go back.
Or type *human* if you want to explain directly to our team."
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $('Prepare Bot Data').item.json.chat_id }}",
  "text": "👋 Welcome to *TechExon*

We build smart digital systems for businesses — websites, automations, dashboards, WhatsApp bots, and security audit reports.

How can we help you today?

1️⃣ *AI Automation* 🤖
Automate replies, follow-ups, data entry, lead handling, and daily business workflows.

2️⃣ *Website Development* 🌐
Modern business websites, landing pages, booking websites, portfolios, and custom web apps.

3️⃣ *CRM / Dashboard Systems* 📊
Track leads, clients, payments, follow-ups, bookings, team tasks, and reports in one place.

4️⃣ *WhatsApp Bot Automation* 💬
Create WhatsApp menu bots, lead collection bots, appointment bots, support bots, and CRM integrations.

5️⃣ *Cybersecurity / Audit Reports* 🛡️
Website/domain security checks, email security review, exposed data checks, vulnerability reports, and business audit reports.

Reply with a number from *1 to 5*.

You can type *menu* anytime to restart."
}

parameters.name: text

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $json;

const systemPrompt = `
You are a senior lead qualification assistant for TechExon.

TechExon provides:
- AI automation
- Website development
- CRM / dashboard systems
- WhatsApp bot automation
- Cybersecurity and audit reports

Your job is to analyze WhatsApp lead messages and extract useful business and project details.

Important rules:
- Return ONLY valid JSON.
- Do not use markdown.
- Do not explain anything outside JSON.
- If a value is clearly mentioned, extract it.
- If a value is clearly inferable, infer it carefully.
- If information is missing, use "Unknown".
- Do not invent fake company names, websites, phone numbers, budgets, or timelines.
- Keep summaries short, professional, and useful for a sales/admin team.
- Choose lead_quality as one of: low, medium, high.
- Choose urgency as one of: low, medium, high, unknown.
- Choose budget_signal as one of: unknown, low, medium, high.

Special handling:
- For website leads, identify website type, domain status, and reference site if mentioned.
- For CRM/dashboard leads, identify the dashboard type and what the client wants to track.
- For WhatsApp bot leads, identify bot purpose, lead capture target, and automation need.
- For AI automation leads, identify the business process the client wants to automate.
- For cybersecurity leads, identify the audit need, likely risk concern, and recommended next step.
- For cybersecurity leads, always include authorization/domain confirmation in missing_fields or follow_up_question if not provided.
`;

const userPrompt =
  "Selected service: " + lead.selected_service + "\n" +
  "Current flow: " + lead.current_flow + "\n" +
  "Client phone: " + lead.phone + "\n" +
  "Client message:\n" + lead.requirements + "\n\n" +

  "Analyze the client message and return this exact JSON structure:\n" +
  "{\n" +
  "  \"business_name\": \"Extract business/company name if mentioned, otherwise Unknown\",\n" +
  "  \"business_type\": \"Infer business type if possible, otherwise Unknown\",\n" +
  "  \"selected_service\": \"Use the selected service or a corrected matching TechExon service\",\n" +
  "  \"requirement_summary\": \"Short professional summary of what the client wants\",\n" +
  "  \"main_problem\": \"The main problem or need the client is trying to solve\",\n" +
  "  \"suggested_solution\": \"What TechExon should offer next\",\n" +
  "  \"budget_signal\": \"unknown, low, medium, or high\",\n" +
  "  \"urgency\": \"low, medium, high, or unknown\",\n" +
  "  \"missing_fields\": [\"List important missing details needed for follow-up\"],\n" +
  "  \"lead_quality\": \"low, medium, or high\",\n" +
  "  \"follow_up_question\": \"One best question TechExon should ask next\"\n" +
  "}";

return [
  {
    json: {
      ...lead,
      cerebras_body: {
        model: "llama3.1-8b",
        stream: false,
        temperature: 0.2,
        max_tokens: 700,
        messages: [
          {
            role: "system",
            content: systemPrompt.trim()
          },
          {
            role: "user",
            content: userPrompt
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "{{ $('Prepare AI Input').item.json.client_phone || $('lb to cn').item.json.pn }}",
  "text": "👋 *Welcome to TechExon*

We help businesses with AI automation, websites, CRM dashboards, WhatsApp bots, and cybersecurity audits.

Please choose an option:

1️⃣ AI Automation
2️⃣ Website Development
3️⃣ CRM / Dashboard System
4️⃣ WhatsApp Bot Automation
5️⃣ Cybersecurity / Audit Report

You can also type your requirement directly, for example:
_I need a website for my business_"
}

={
  "session": "default",
  "chatId": "91ADMINNUMBER@c.us",
  "text": {{ JSON.stringify("🚨 *New TechExon AI Lead*

📌 *Service:* " + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.service + "
🏢 *Business Type:* " + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.business_type + "
📞 *Client Phone:* " + $('Prepare AI Input').item.json.client_phone + "

💬 *Client Message:*
" + $('Prepare AI Input').item.json.client_message + "

📝 *Requirement:*
" + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.requirement + "

⚡ *Urgency:* " + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.urgency + "
🔥 *Lead Quality:* " + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.lead_quality + "

🧠 *AI Summary:*
" + $('Parse AI Result').item.json.admin_summary) }}
}

parameters.fields: ={   "source": "whatsapp",   "client_phone": "{{ $('Prepare AI Input').item.json.client_phone }}",   "client_message": "{{ $('Prepare AI Input').item.json.client_message }}",   "service": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.service }}",   "business_type": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.business_type }}",   "requirement": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.requirement }}",   "urgency": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.urgency }}",   "lead_quality": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.lead_quality }}",   "client_reply": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.client_reply }}",   "admin_summary": "{{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.admin_summary }}",   "status": "new",   "source_workflow": "TechExon WhatsApp AI Lead Agent",   "created_at": "{{ $now }}" }
